channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Another absndoned e bike, 10th June
item.description:
These are too heavy to lift but are right by a busy nursery causing an obstacle and an eyesore

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: SORN VAN Parked on Street, 10th June
item.description:
I reported this white Suzuki EO51YYZ on the 12th of February for no tax. It is now SORN and still parked on the road. It hasn't had a MOT since 3 April 2025. It is abandoned with flat tyres and has not moved for over a year. The picture I have added is of the van from May 2025 and it's in the same spot in June 2026 - 13 months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swiftsden Way, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 11 e bikes various types abandoned, 10th June
item.description:
EBikes left chaotically outside Penge East - eyesore and obstacle

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned ebike, 10th June
item.description:
Its a trip hazard and an eyesore and its been there 2 days

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Newlands Park, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Lime bike for 3 days, 10th June
item.description:
This Lime bike has been obstructing the pavement for 3 days

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 14 abandoned ebikes near Penge East stn, 10th June
item.description:
There are 14 different abandoned ebikes causing trip and obstacle hazards within 50m of the station

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sylvester avenue - broken pavements and trip hassards caused by tree routes on both sides of road, 10th June
item.description:
There are at least 6 seperate places along both sides of This rosd where pavements are badly cracked or lifted from tree routes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sylvester Avenue, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large rubbish items dumped on back road, 9th June
item.description:
The rubbish has been there for over a month. It is blocking access to back gates.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Strathnairn Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Melbourne Grove (next to phone shop)-Bin overflowing with waste, 9th June
item.description:
Bins need to be emptied.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Grove Vale, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge and growing pile of dumped household goods, 9th June
item.description:
This pile of discarded electronics, fridge freezer and now general rubbish at the back of the flats on Tom Smith Close has been here for almost a month and continues to grow. A terrible first impression for visitors arriving at Maze Hill station and a disgrace and hazard for our neighbourhood.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tom Smith Close, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti/tag on pedestrian crossing controller box, 9th June
item.description:
Graffiti seen 09 June 2026. Unreadable characters followed by MQZ.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camberwell New Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Lime bike blocking pavement, 9th June
item.description:
Been here for 2 days now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Conway Road, Plumstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown path, 9th June
item.description:
Brambles and other vegetation starting to grow across the cross path half way down Martin's Hill. Also near the top of the path that leads down through the woods from the top of Martin's Hill.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glassmill Lane, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over grown trees - obscuring view when leaving drive, 9th June
item.description:
The trees have too much overgrown growth at the bottom of the trunk - this obscures view when driving or backing off of drive - dut to parking restrictions we have no option but to park on drive - this is dangerous and will cause an accident
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Brantwood Road, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag of Rubbish Dumped on Pavement, 9th June
item.description:
A bag of rubbish has been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waverley Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Furniture Dumped on Pavement, 9th June
item.description:
An item of broken furniture has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 73. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Durham Rise, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Bird Cage Dumped on Pavement, 9th June
item.description:
An unwanted bird cage has been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Unwanted Fridge-Freezer and Chair Dumped on Pavement, 9th June
item.description:
A large unwanted fridge-freezer and chain have been left dumped on the pavement outside number 106. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Boxes Dumped Under Tree, 9th June
item.description:
A pile of unwanted boxes have been left dumped under the tree opposite number 16. Can the local team please clear them away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Floor-Standing Fan and Strip of Wood Dumped on Turfed Space, 9th June
item.description:
An unwanted floor-standing fan and a strip of wood has been left dumped on the turfed area. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burrage Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
